name: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Latam Equity Fund
summary: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Latam Equity Fund is a Latin American equity investment fund. It is managed by Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos and focuses on generating returns through investments in stocks from Latin American companies.
